description_long: A stack of four fluffy pancakes sits neatly on a round, light blue plate. The pancakes are golden-brown with slightly uneven edges, giving them a homemade appearance. A generous layer of creamy white sauce or icing covers the top pancake, with a drizzle of golden syrup artistically spread across the surface and dripping down the sides. The syrup appears thick and glossy, pooling slightly at the base of the stack. The pancakes are stacked directly on top of each other, and the plate is smooth and unadorned. No additional garnishes or toppings are present aside from the syrup and sauce.
description: A stack of four golden pancakes with white sauce and syrup sits on a light blue plate. The syrup drips down the sides, creating a glossy, appetizing look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the stack of pancakes with syrup and sauce mostly pooled on top and a little dripping down the left side.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the even layering of the pancakes and a small amount of syrup running down the right edge.
description_view_2: From this angle, syrup is visibly dripping down the front of the stack, pooling at the base of the pancakes.
description_view_3: The back view shows the syrup and sauce spread more evenly, with less visible dripping compared to the front.
